svg.title: Enterprise Identity Infrastructure Blueprint
svg.desc: High-contrast flowchart: HR data flows through PowerShell automation into Microsoft Entra ID tenant, through dynamic groups and security engines, to cloud applications.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the HR data source and employee roster provisioning')
sendPrompt('What does the attribute validation layer check before Graph API ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How does the PowerShell bulk import script work with the Microsoft Graph API?')
sendPrompt('What user attributes are set during provisioning in Entra ID?')

svg.text: Attribute-driven dynamic security groups · ~5 min re-evaluation latency

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the IT department dynamic group rule work?')
sendPrompt('How does the HR department dynamic group rule work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Engineering dynamic group rule work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Sales department dynamic group rule work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Finance department dynamic group rule work?')
sendPrompt('How does Intune device compliance feed into Conditional Access?')
sendPrompt('How does Conditional Access evaluate MFA, user risk, sign-in risk, and device compliance?')
sendPrompt('How does PIM just-in-time role activation work and how does it feed into Conditional Access?')
sendPrompt('What cloud applications are covered by SSO via SAML and OIDC? How does SCIM provisioning work?')
g.text: Office 365 · Salesforce · Slack · Zoom · SAML 2.0 / OIDC · SCIM
